overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a gritty urban commercial street, passing liquor stores and groups of pedestrians, then crossing a multi-lane intersection with moderate traffic. The setting features power lines, billboards, and distant downtown skyscrapers under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with liquor store and pedestrian groups

events.description: clip begins on urban street with storefronts and billboards
game UI text overlay appears in top left corner indicating Director Mode

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past groups of pedestrians gathered outside storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing outside liquor store entrance
pedestrian in blue jacket walking along storefront windows

entered.detail: single-story commercial building with large yellow LIQUOR signage and dark green facade
large rectangular billboard with WARNING text and face image mounted on building roof
storefront with orange Scooter La La Land signage next to liquor store
wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and overhead wires lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a gritty urban commercial street with a prominent liquor store on the left and pedestrians gathered outside. The camera follows the character walking along the concrete sidewalk past various storefronts under an overcast sky, with power lines and a large warning billboard visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with bus stop and distant downtown view

events.description: passing from crowded storefront area to more open sidewalk with bus shelter
white and yellow taco van drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: continuing along cracked sidewalk past the bus stop shelter with advertisement poster

notable_agents.action: white taco van with yellow stripe driving along the road passing the character

entered.detail: green metal and glass bus shelter with DESTROY basketball advertisement poster
distant city skyscrapers including tall tower visible through atmospheric haze
brick building with yellow DAVIS ELECTRICAL signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a less crowded section of sidewalk featuring a bus stop shelter with a basketball advertisement. The character walks past the Davis Electrical building while a taco van drives by on the street, and the downtown skyline becomes visible in the distance through the haze.

events.description: character steps off curb and begins crossing the multi-lane street
vehicles passing through intersection as character navigates crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road, navigating between moving vehicles toward the opposite side

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving through the intersection
white car approaching the intersection from the distance

entered.detail: large colorful gas station price sign with red, yellow, and blue panels
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the multi-lane road
bright yellow fire hydrant on the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection crosswalk, moving from the confined sidewalk to the open street. Traffic flows through the intersection as the character crosses, with a gas station sign and traffic lights becoming prominent features while the downtown skyline appears closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: opposite side of intersection with traffic control

events.description: black SUV stops at crosswalk to let pedestrian pass in front
character reaches opposite sidewalk and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: crossing in front of stopped black SUV and proceeding along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at crosswalk waiting for pedestrian to clear the path
pedestrian in plaid shirt and red cap walking on the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: large yellow billboard with ACE LIQUOR text and logo
low-rise commercial buildings lining the far side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character completes the street crossing in front of a stopped black SUV, reaching the opposite sidewalk. The segment features the ACE Liquor billboard prominently on the right while the character continues walking past new storefronts and encounters a pedestrian in a plaid shirt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a gritty urban commercial street that gradually opens up as it crosses a wide city intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk past a liquor store and gathered pedestrians under an overcast sky, with power lines and a large warning billboard overhead. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a less crowded area featuring a bus stop with a basketball advertisement and the Davis Electrical building, while a taco van passes by and the distant downtown skyline emerges through the haze. The camera then follows the character from the confined sidewalk into the open expanse of a multi-lane crosswalk, where traffic flows past prominent gas station signs and traffic lights. Finally, the movement concludes as the character passes a stopped black SUV to reach the opposite sidewalk, moving past an ACE Liquor billboard and a pedestrian in a plaid shirt.
